## my spectrwm config
<div align="left">
```bash
          spectrwm config
  -------------------------------
  wm           -> spectrwm
  bar          -> polybar
  app launcher -> dmenu
  terminal     -> st/kitty
  editor       -> neovim/emacs/vscode(rare use cases)
  shell        -> zsh
  font         -> Jet Brains Mono NF
  music player -> cmus(no original config tho[yet] )
```

</div>
